+        "title": "Review cloudevents configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant cloudevents configuration:\nThis is a proposed metadata attribute (from Context Attribute Backlog):\n\ncausation-id\n    Type: String\n    Description: event-id of event that triggered this event to be created (if any). If not triggered in response to an event, then not present."

+        "title": "Apply the fix for causation-id context attribute",

I want to adhere to the CNCF policy against kingmaking even\n   though I think the world is better off with one interoperable\n   tracing standard.\n2. Nothing in the trace state should have an effect on\n   application logic.\n3. I like exercising our thoughts on extensions.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
